descriptionShort: Preview of Richmond Sockeyes 1987-88 season following their Centennial Cup championship, highlighting returning players and recruitment efforts under coach Orland Kurtenbach.
descriptionLong: The BC Junior Hockey League begins its 1987-88 season with the Richmond Sockeyes looking to repeat their success after winning the Centennial Cup in spring 1987. Though only four players return from the championship roster, coach Orland Kurtenbach's strong recruitment program is expected to maintain competitiveness. Returning players include goalie Glenn Pencer (fifth season), right winger Rob Clarke (65 goals, 35 assists last year), centre Jason Tallo, and right winger Tony Bobbit.
